title: Village Farms Q1 2024 Strong Financial Results
text: Village Farms Q1 2024 consolidated sales increased 27% to $50.2 million versus consensus estimate of $49.41 million. EPS of $0.02, in-line with analyst estimate. Compared to a loss of $0.06 per share a year ago. Q1 was an especially strong start to 2024 with Canadian Cannabis retail branded sales growing 28% year-over-year, all organically. Company led the top five LPs in market share growth. Completion of internalization of gummy production was on track for Q2 2024. Delta, British Columbia Renewable Natural Gas Project began operations, immediately contributing incremental profitability. Cannabis net sales grew 27% to $49.7 million. Cannabis segment net income jumped 68% to $4.8 million. International export sales grew 171% to record $14.6 million. Netherlands sales increased 448%. Canadian retail branded sales rose 5%.
